ZOREN_details.name: Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S.
ZOREN_details.description: Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the trading, distribution, retailing, and sales of electricity in Turkey and internationally. It is also involved in wholesale purchase of electrical energy and capacity and sales activities; engineering and consultancy activities for energy projects; operation and maintenance activities for energy projects and other; maintenance, repair, installation, and sale of charging stations; rental, leasing and other services of motorized light land vehicles and cars without adrives; aggregation, balancing service and other services; solar panel production and inverter sales; carbon selling; and panel production. Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S. was founded in 1993 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

ZRGYO_details.name: Ziraat Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
ZRGYO_details.description: Ziraat Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a real estate investment company in Turkey. Its portfolio consists of office building, and hotel and housing investments. The company was founded in 2016 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.

ZGYO_details.name: Z Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi
ZGYO_details.description: Z Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi engages in investing in real estate projects in Turkey. The company is based in Ankara, Turkey.

ZERGY_details.name: Zeray Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi
ZERGY_details.description: Zeray Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi develops and manages real estate properties. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Kocaeli, Turkey.

YKBNK_details.name: Yapi ve Kredi Bankasi A.S.
YKBNK_details.description: Yapi ve Kredi Bankasi A.S., together with its subsidiaries, provides commercial banking and financial products and services in Turkey and internationally. It operates through three segments: Retail Banking; Corporate Banking; and Commercial and SME Banking. The Retail Banking segment offers banking products and services, such as card payment systems; individual portfolio; blue class; private and gold banking; general purpose, commercial installments, and auto loans; mortgages; time and demand deposits; investment accounts; life and non-life insurance products; wealth management activities; and payroll services. This segment also provides time deposit products, mutual funds, foreign exchange, and gold and equity trading services; and personal art, inheritance, real estate, tax, education, and philanthropic advisory services. The Corporate, Commercial, and SME Banking segment offers corporate banking for large-scale, international, and multinational companies; commercial banking for medium-sized enterprises; and SME banking, such as SME loans and banking packages products for SME companies. This segment also provides working capital, trade, and project finance, as well as domestic and international non-cash loans comprising letters of credit and guarantee, cash management, and internet banking services; and financial and equity management advisory services. It offers custody, leasing, investment and portfolio management, and factoring services. The company also provides money transfer; debit, world, business cards; home loan; checks and promissory notes services; and SME loans. It serves customers through ATMs; and telephone, Internet, and mobile banking services. The was incorporated in 1944 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

YUNSA_details.name: Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
YUNSA_details.description: Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the production and marketing of woolen textile products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers men and women fabrics; premium fabrics; corporate wear fabrics; and upholstery fabrics primarily used in commercial vehicle industry. It also provides wool blends, such as cashmere, silk, viscose, and other products. Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Yünsa Yünlü Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Sürmegöz Tekstil Yatirim A.S.

YYLGD_details.name: Yayla Agro Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
YYLGD_details.description: Yayla Agro Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells various food and grains in Turkey and internationally. It involved in the supply of food products, including paddy, bulgur, pulses, and shelled lentils; production of packaged ready to cook mix food, such as rice and bulgur mixed with various super and natural foods, such as dried tomatoes, dried mushrooms, and eggplant and other vegetables; production of rice, wheat, black beans, maize, beans, chickpeas, kidney beans, bulgur, paddy, lentils, and corn; ready to eat products, which includes pilaki, meaty dried beans and chickpeas, soups, bulgur and rice pilafs, pasta, compotes, legume and olive oil dishes, and grain and legum salads; and engages in trading of unprocessed cereals, grains, and pulses such as wheat, corn, barley, rice, paddy, and lentils as commercial goods. It also provides boiled products comprising boiled chickpeas, beans, ashura wheat, mexican beans, peas, quinoa, and grain corn; and seeds, such as red, black, white, and mixed quinoa, bulghur, chia, white chia, white chia seeds, beluga lentils, mung beans, basmati, sushi, black, and risotto rice, buckwheat, teff, amaranth, and flaxseed. In addition, it offers ezogelin soup with einkorn bulgur; lentil soup with quinoa; gourmet lentil soup; and Ala Çiftçi gourmet fit products. It serves hotels, restaurants, catering companies, restaurants, cafes, cafeterias, education, and health institutions. Yayla Agro Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Kahramankazan, Turkey.

KARSN_details.name: Karsan Otomotiv Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S.
KARSN_details.description: Karsan Otomotiv Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the production and sale of automotives and related vehicles, and spare parts in Turkey and internationally. It operates through Karsan Branded Products and Spare Parts and other branded sales segments. The company provides passenger cars, trucks, minibuses, buses, hydrogen buses, and electric and diesel buses. It also offers after-sales, marketing, and financial leasing services. The company sells its products under the JEST, ATAK, and STAR brand names. Karsan Otomotiv Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1966 and is headquartered in Bursa, Turkey. The company operates as a subsidiary of Kiraca Holding AS.
